ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "week_num" INTEGER /* Week number of the season */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the game took place */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win or Loss) */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, championship) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's home stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "years_active" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been active */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive stats entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "first_down_def" INTEGER /* Number of first downs allowed by the defense */,
  "rushes_defended" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts defended */,
  "rush_yds_def" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards allowed by the defense */,
  "fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles forced by the defense */,
  "completions_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of completions allowed */,
  "passes_defended" INTEGER /* Number of passes defended */,
  "pass_yds_def" INTEGER /* Total passing yards allowed by the defense */,
  "interceptions_caught" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions caught */,
  "sack_yds_def" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks by the defense */,
  "penalty_yds_for" INTEGER /* Penalty yards for the defense */,
  "plays_defended" INTEGER /* Total defensive plays run */,
  "avg_ko_return_against" REAL /* Average kickoff return yards against */,
  "avg_punt_return_against" REAL /* Average punt return yards against */,
  "avg_punt_dist_against" REAL /* Average punt distance against */,
  "total_plays_defended" INTEGER /* Total plays defended by the defense */,
  "avg_time_of_possession_allowed" REAL /* Average time of possession allowed */,
  "avg_yards_allowed_per_play" REAL /* Average yards allowed per play */,
  "avg_points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "third_down_stop_percentage" REAL /* Third down stop percentage */,
  "fourth_down_stop_percentage" REAL /* Fourth down stop percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stats entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards gained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
